projects.name: Project Dashboard
projects.summary: Standalone LAN dashboard that summarizes local projects, states, next actions, blockers, and recent continuity activity.
next_actions: Refresh data/projects.json whenever project handoffs or status files materially change.
Decide whether to add a generator that rebuilds the dashboard data from continuity files automatically.
Keep the detached tmux server running on port 8090 for LAN access.

projects.name: Investing Agent
projects.summary: Read-only finance dashboard and investing-agent scoping area with live Binance.US crypto data, charts, congressional disclosure context, and practical research guidance.
next_actions: Define whether the first version is research-only, alerts, paper trading, or live execution.
Choose watchlist assets and permitted data sources.
Build the first read-only daily brief before adding trading capability.
Add approved congressional trade data from an API, scraper, or parsed export.
blockers: Agent scope, data sources, and risk rules are not defined yet.
No investing-agent implementation exists in the project folder yet.
Congressional trade rows are not yet live.

projects.name: Prepper Disk
projects.summary: Local-first archive and LAN dashboard for offline references, identity reset docs, finance panels, indexes, and checksums.
next_actions: Keep the dashboard index and checksums refreshed after major content changes.
Decide what, if anything, should sync down from Google Drive later.
Keep secrets only in encrypted vault files, never plaintext docs or dashboard data.

projects.name: Sci Fi Story

next_actions: Re-run the rclone sync when the Google Drive source changes.
